understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate through multiple levels by completing all goal cells in each level. Each goal cell required my piece's shape, color, and rotation to match specific values before stepping on it to complete it. I needed to reach and activate all goals to advance through levels and ultimately complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement costs 1 stamina per step. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina to maximum. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement - always check blocked_directions before choosing where to move. Various tiles modify my piece: shape modifier cycles shape, color modifier cycles color in order orange→blue→green→red→orange, and rotation modifier turns the piece 90 degrees clockwise. Goals only activate when shape, color, and rotation all match. I need to plan routes carefully to minimize wasted moves.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate through multiple levels by completing all goal cells in each level. Each goal cell required my piece's shape, color, and rotation to match specific values before stepping on it to complete it. I needed to reach and activate all goals to advance through levels and ultimately complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement costs 1 stamina per step. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina to maximum. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement - always check blocked_directions before choosing where to move. Various tiles modify my piece: shape modifier cycles shape, color modifier cycles color in order orange→blue→green→red→orange, and rotation modifier turns the piece 90 degrees clockwise. Goals only activate when shape, color, and rotation all match. I need to plan routes carefully to minimize wasted moves.
